7 Partial_flag Partial County Indicator Char 1 Indicates that the Part D plan benefit package (segment) covers only a portion of the county. Blank Plan benefit package segment covers the whole county or does not vary by segment.
 Y Plan benefit package segment covers only a portion of the county
